name: Broccoli Salad Mold
recipeIngredient: 1 Bunch Fresh Broccoli, Cook and Chop Lightly
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the broccoli and eggs.
2. Soften the gelatin in cold water and add heated consommé.
3. Stir until the consommé dissolves the gelatin; then add the rest of the ingredients and pour over the broccoli and eggs.
4. Mix well.
5. Pour into a ring mold or 12 individual molds.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Serve with fresh garden lettuce and homemade mayonnaise.
Serves 12
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
